freeConsultation.title: Get a Free 30-Minute Expert Consultation
freeConsultation.description: Not sure where to start? Our property experts will review your documents, assess your situation, and give you a clear action plan. No strings attached.
freeConsultation.selectProperty: Select a property for your consultation
freeConsultation.addPropertyFirst: Add a property first to book a consultation.

detail.descriptionPlaceholder: Briefly describe what you need help with. For example: 'I need verification of land purchase documents for a plot in Dhaka division...'
detail.timeSlotsHelp: Select 2-5 time slots when you are available. Our consultant will confirm one of these times after your purchase.
detail.selectAtLeast2Slots: Select at least 2 time slots to enable booking
detail.selectAtLeast2SlotsError: Please select at least 2 preferred time slots.
